creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: pyproject.toml is not yet supported by our Uses/python.mk (I've had to add `setup.py` with `from setuptools import setup; setup()` for a couple of ports which have really dropped it) so migrating off it is a large task and out of scope of this pr. I'm also not quite sure how we can switch to pyproject.toml for at least py-sqlite, as setup.py there contains some logic dependent on python version.
